allow: Bash(powershell -Command "if \(Test-Path 'pdf_ofd_converter_temp'\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'pdf_ofd_converter_temp' }; git clone https://github.com/brianshih04/PDF_OFD_Converter pdf_ofd_converter_temp; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'pdf_ofd_converter_temp\\*' 'pdf_ofd_converter\\'; if \(Test-Path 'pdf_ofd_converter_temp\\.git'\) { Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'pdf_ofd_converter_temp\\.git' 'pdf_ofd_converter\\.git' }; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'pdf_ofd_converter_temp'")
